---
title: "Blauer Löwe"
authors:
  - name: "Max"
    url: "https://github.com/Max"
  - name: "Genevieve Ponelle"
    url: "https://github.com/Genevieve Ponelle"
  - name: "Unknown"
authors_links: "[Max](https://github.com/Max), [Genevieve Ponelle](https://github.com/Genevieve Ponelle), Unknown"
rank: 6
---
**Screencast**

<video controls width="100%" style="margin-bottom: 2em;"><source src="Screencast Projekt 3.mp4" type="video/mp4"></video>
**Ausarbeitung**

<iframe src="Projekt_Testprojekt-2.html" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="1200" style="border:0"></iframe>
